artifact_patterns.description: Configure Aider behavior, models, API settings, git integration, file handling, testing
notes: Home directory, git repository root, or current directory
Can be user-level (home) or project-level (git root/current dir)
Priority: Files loaded in order: home → git root → current directory (last takes precedence)
Key sections: Model settings, API keys (OpenAI/Anthropic only), git integration, output/display, repository mapping, file handling, chat/history, testing/linting, voice features
File must use .yml extension (.yaml not recognized)

artifact_patterns.description: Specify files and directories Aider should ignore
notes: Git repository root (default) or configurable location
Location customizable via aiderignore option in .aider.conf.yml
